label: Masked prediction objectives

node.label: Masked prediction objectives
node.definition: Hidden portions of an input are predicted from visible context; it operationally connects Self-supervised learning and Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Masked prediction objectives is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units and feeding downstream nodes such as Large-scale pretraining, Encoder-only bidirectional transformers, Diffusion and masked-generative language models.
examples: atlas downstream link to Large-scale pretraining
atlas downstream link to Encoder-only bidirectional transformers
atlas downstream link to Diffusion and masked-generative language models
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, Masked prediction objectives has a `uses` dependency on Self-supervised learning because Self-supervised learning is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, Masked prediction objectives has a `uses` dependency on Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units because Tokens, vocabularies & symbolic units is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, Masked prediction objectives has a `uses` dependency on Images, video & spatial grids because Images, video & spatial grids is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
